description: This file defines a utility class 'ScrollBarHelper' for managing scrollbar behavior, including showing/hiding scrollbars and adjusting element padding/margins accordingly. It is part of the Bootstrap framework's internal utilities.

classes.name: ScrollBarHelper
classes.description: A utility class for managing scrollbar visibility and related style adjustments in Bootstrap.

methods.name: constructor
methods.description: Initializes the ScrollBarHelper instance, setting the target element to document.body.

methods.name: getWidth
methods.description: Calculates and returns the width of the scrollbar by comparing window inner width and document client width.

methods.name: hide
methods.description: Hides the scrollbar by disabling overflow and adjusting padding/margin of fixed and sticky content.

methods.name: reset
methods.description: Resets the style adjustments made by hide(), restoring original styles.

methods.name: isOverflowing
methods.description: Checks if the scrollbar is currently overflowing (visible).

methods.name: _disableOverFlow
methods.description: Private method to disable overflow on the target element and save its initial style.

methods.name: _setElementAttributes
methods.description: Private method to set style properties on elements selected by a selector, adjusting for scrollbar width.

methods.name: _saveInitialAttribute
methods.description: Private method to save the current style property value of an element.

methods.name: _resetElementAttributes
methods.description: Private method to restore style properties to their original values.

methods.name: _applyManipulationCallback
methods.description: Private method to apply a callback function to elements selected by a selector.
